title: Ismene calathina
taxonomy: Ismene calathina is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Amaryllidaceae. This family is a large group of flowering plants commonly known as the amaryllis family. It is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Allioideae and the Amaryllidoideae. Within the Amaryllidoideae subfamily, Ismene calathina is part of the tribe Griseinae, which includes several other genera of flowering plants. The exact classification of Ismene calathina may vary depending on the source and the specific criteria used.
